{{Quote|Worlds as spread apart as Havricus, Sermeria, Tynna, Nar Bo Sholla and Deylerax have reported damage from stone mites, though nothing on Ord Tiddell's scale.|HoloNet News report|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Havricus''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="HNN" /> located in the [[Havricus system/Legends|Havricus system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. It was situated on the [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroute]] known as the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]], which served as the dividing line between the regions known as [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] and the [[Southern Core]] and linked it to the [[Pencael system/Legends|Pencael system]] as well as the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim's]] [[Iseno system/Legends|Iseno system]].<ref name="TEA Havricus" />

During the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|beginning]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]<ref name="CSWE Havricus">{{CSWECite|II|26|Havricus}}</ref> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> Havricus became one of the several worlds of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] that experienced an infestation of [[Stone mite/Legends|stone mites]]—[[Arthropod/Legends|arthropods]] [[Diet/Legends|feeding]] on [[Silicate/Legends|silicates]] and complex metals. An issue of the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] released on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] 13:5:9 noted that Havricus reported damage to the world's structures from the infestation.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Havricus was first mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 55|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #55'']], an [[in-universe]] issue of the HoloNet News<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]],<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]] on [[May 9]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN55 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6774521|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-05-09|time=4:55 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20220611192020/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-14}}</ref> [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' placed Havricus in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]],<ref name="CSWE Havricus" /> although that placement was overriden by the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', which instead placed the Havricus [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Havricus itself, in grid square N-12 as part of the Colonies.<ref name="TEA Havricus" />
